summary: Both REQ-1 and REQ-2 appear to be implemented. The CheckoutPage.tsx was modified to include a 'Secure Payment Process' notice box (Lock icon import is present, though file is truncated), and ThankYouPage.tsx clearly shows the full payment instructions block with the correct text, #F8F5F0 background, lock icon, rounded corners, and proper styling. REQ-2 is fully verified. REQ-1 cannot be fully confirmed due to truncation of CheckoutPage.tsx, but the imports and structure strongly suggest it is implemented.

hallucinated_features.description: The ThankYouPage payment notice block includes a title 'Secure Payment Process' which was not explicitly requested for the ThankYouPage. REQ-2 only specified the payment instructions text body without a titled section header.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-2 specifies the message text but does not call for a 'Secure Payment Process' title on the ThankYouPage. The diff adds both a title and body text on ThankYouPage, whereas the title was only specified for the CheckoutPage notice box in REQ-1.
